name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N : /\ flag[i] = FALSE
                     /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                     /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
                     /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
                     /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ Len(q) = 0
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1

Producer == /\ Len(q) < K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ q' = Append(q, 1)

Consumer == /\ Len(q) > 0
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
  /\ readers = <<>>
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == 
  \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
     /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
  \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
     /\ readers' = <<>>
  \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
     /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES channel, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ Len(file) = FILE_SIZE
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ Len(chunks) = Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq
    /\ Len(sentChunks) = 0
    /\ retransmitCount \in Seq
    /\ Len(retransmitCount) = 0
    /\ channel \in Seq
    /\ Len(channel) = 0

Next ==
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, lastChunk)
    /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 0)
    /\ channel' = Append(channel, lastChunk)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

Retransmit ==
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, lastChunk)
    /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, retransmitCount[lastChunk] + 1)
    /\ channel' = Append(channel, lastChunk)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

lastChunk ==

        Head(chunks)

        <<>>

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Keys, Value, Values, NULL

VARIABLES db, txns, nextTxId, committed, aborted, readSet, writeSet, writeVals, snapshot, status, k, tid
TypeOK == /\ db \in [Key \in Keys |-> Value]
          /\ txns \in SUBSET Keys
          /\ nextTxId \in Keys
          /\ committed \in SUBSET Keys
          /\ aborted \in SUBSET Keys
          /\ readSet \in [Key \in Keys |-> SUBSET Keys]
          /\ writeSet \in [Key \in Keys |-> SUBSET Keys]
          /\ writeVals \in [Key \in Keys |-> [Key \in Keys |-> Value]]
          /\ snapshot \in [Key \in Keys |-> [Key \in Keys |-> Value]]
          /\ status \in [Key \in Keys |-> {"active", "committed", "aborted"}]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ db \in [Key \in Keys |-> Value]
        /\ txns = {}
        /\ nextTxId \in Keys
        /\ committed = {}
        /\ aborted = {}
        /\ readSet = [k \in Keys |-> {}]
        /\ writeSet = [k \in Keys |-> {}]
        /\ writeVals = [k \in Keys |-> [k' \in Keys |-> NULL]]
        /\ snapshot = [k \in Keys |-> db]
        /\ status = [k \in Keys |-> "active"]

(* Begin a transaction *)
BeginTxn == /\ nextTxId \in Keys
          /\ txns' = txns \cup {nextTxId}
          /\ snapshot' = [k \in Keys |-> db]
          /\ status' = [k \in Keys |-> IF k = nextTxId THEN "active" ELSE status[k]]
          /\ nextTxId' = nextTxId + 1
          /\ UNCHANGED <<db, readSet, writeSet, writeVals, committed, aborted>>

(* Read a key *)
ReadTxn(tid, k) == /\ tid \in txns
                  /\ k \in Keys
                  /\ status[tid] = "active"
                  /\ readSet' = [k' \in Keys : IF k' = tid THEN readSet[tid] \cup {k} ELSE readSet[k']]
                  /\ UNCHANGED <<db, txns, nextTxId, committed, aborted, writeSet, writeVals, snapshot, status>>

(* Write a key *)
WriteTxn(tid, k, v) == /\ tid \in txns
                      /\ k \in Keys
                      /\ v \in Values
                      /\ status[tid] = "active"
                      /\ writeSet' = [k' \in Keys : IF k' = tid THEN writeSet[tid] \cup {k} ELSE writeSet[k']]
                      /\ writeVals' = [k' \in Keys : IF k' = tid THEN [k'' \in Keys : IF k'' = k THEN v ELSE writeVals[tid][k'']] ELSE writeVals[k']]
                      /\ UNCHANGED <<db, txns, nextTxId, committed, aborted, readSet, snapshot, status>>

(* Commit a transaction *)
CommitTxn(tid) == /\ tid \in txns
                 /\ status[tid] = "active"
                 /\ \A k \in writeSet[tid] : \A tid' \in txns : tid' # tid /\ status[tid'] = "active" /\ k \in writeSet[tid'] => FALSE
                 /\ db' = [k \in Keys |-> IF k \in writeSet[tid] THEN writeVals[tid][k] ELSE db[k]]
                 /\ committed' = committed \cup {tid}
                 /\ status' = [k \in Keys |-> IF k = tid THEN "committed" ELSE status[k]]
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<txns, nextTxId, aborted, readSet, writeSet, writeVals, snapshot>>

(* Abort a transaction *)
AbortTxn(tid) == /\ tid \in txns
                 /\ status[tid] = "active"
                 /\ aborted' = aborted \cup {tid}
                 /\ status' = [k \in Keys |-> IF k = tid THEN "aborted" ELSE status[k]]
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<db, txns, nextTxId, committed, readSet, writeSet, writeVals, snapshot>>

(* Next action *)
Next == \/ \E tid \in txns : /\ status[tid] = "active" /\ BeginTxn
          \/ \E tid \in txns : \E k \in Keys : /\ status[tid] = "active" /\ ReadTxn(tid, k)
          \/ \E tid \in txns : \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ status[tid] = "active" /\ WriteTxn(tid, k, v)
          \/ \E tid \in txns : /\ status[tid] = "active" /\ CommitTxn(tid)
          \/ \E tid \in txns : /\ status[tid] = "active" /\ AbortTxn(tid)

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<db, txns, nextTxId, committed, aborted, readSet, writeSet, writeVals, snapshot, status>>

====

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks[i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ offsets[i] = offsets[i] + (RandomOffset)
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks[i] = clocks[i] + (AverageOffset)
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ offsets[i] = offsets[i] + (RandomOffset)

RandomOffset == CHOOSE d \in -Delta..Delta : d
AverageOffset == CHOOSE d \in -Delta..Delta : d

TypeOK == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
          /\ offsets \in [1..N -> Int]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE, ![2] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 2
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
          /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected) = N

Next == /\ known' = known
      /\ infected' = [i \in 1..N |-> 

              infected[i] \/ {i}

              infected[i] \/ {i} \/ known[i] \/ {i}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in Pages
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}

Next == 
  \/ /\ turn = 0
      /\ wants = 1
      /\ turn' = 1
      /\ wants' = 0
  \/ /\ turn = 1
      /\ wants = 0
      /\ turn' = 0
      /\ wants' = 1
  \/ /\ turn' = turn
      /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
       /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> 0]

Next == /\ \A n \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
       \/ \A n, m \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = Max(counts[n][m], counts[m][n])]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
